data.title: Oriental Explorer Hit by Heavy Property Revaluation Loss in 2025 Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Oriental Explorer Holdings Limited ( (HK:0430) ).

Oriental Explorer Holdings Limited reported full-year 2025 revenue of HK$24.3 million, broadly stable year on year, with gross profit slipping slightly as service costs edged higher. The group also recorded increased other income and reduced finance costs, suggesting some improvements in ancillary income streams and funding costs.

The company posted a sharply wider net loss attributable to shareholders of HK$473.6 million for 2025, compared with a HK$37.9 million loss a year earlier, driven predominantly by a HK$480.9 million negative fair value adjustment on its investment properties. This substantial non-cash revaluation hit wiped out operating profitability and significantly deepened per-share losses, underlining the sensitivity of the group’s results to property market conditions and asset valuations.

Total comprehensive expenses for the year closely matched the reported loss, as currency translation effects from foreign operations were minimal. The results underscore heightened risk exposure for shareholders to fluctuations in property values, which now dominate the company’s earnings profile despite relatively small underlying service revenues.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0430) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oriental Explorer Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:0430 Stock Forecast page.

More about Oriental Explorer Holdings Limited

Oriental Explorer Holdings Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 430. Its business generates modest service revenue and holds investment properties and financial assets, indicating a focus on property-related investment and associated services rather than large-scale operating activities.

Average Trading Volume: 55,345

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$153.3M

4DMedical Ltd, an ASX-listed medtech company specialising in lung imaging and respiratory diagnostic technologies, continues to build its capital base to support its commercial and development activities. data.title: Chanhigh Holdings Profit Halves as Revenue Drops on Weaker Construction Demand
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Chanhigh Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:2017) ).

Chanhigh Holdings Limited reported a sharp decline in performance for the year ended 31 December 2025, with revenue falling to RMB 1,073.4 million from RMB 1,748.3 million and gross profit nearly halving to RMB 70.4 million. Net profit attributable to owners dropped to RMB 13.0 million from RMB 27.3 million, reflecting weaker project volumes, lower margins and reduced contribution from associates, although lower impairment charges and finance costs partly cushioned the downturn.

Operational profitability deteriorated, as profit from operations decreased to RMB 25.3 million from RMB 58.5 million, while earnings per share slid to 2.1 RMB cents from 4.4 RMB cents. An income tax credit of RMB 5.6 million helped keep the group in the black, but the results suggest mounting pressure on its construction services business and signal a more challenging operating environment for stakeholders in the near term.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2017) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.24 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chanhigh Holdings Ltd. stock, see the HK:2017 Stock Forecast page.

More about Chanhigh Holdings Ltd.

Chanhigh Holdings Limited is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2017. The group operates in the construction and related services sector in mainland China, generating revenue primarily from providing contracted services and associated project work for public and private clients.

Average Trading Volume: 127,440

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$124.3M

Learn more about 2017 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh ( (AU:NWS) ) is now available.

News Corporation has disclosed details of a new repurchase program covering its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. The initiative is structured as an “other” buy-back under ASX rules and explicitly excludes any repurchase of ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests.

Under the 2025 Repurchase Program, the company is authorized to buy back up to an aggregate of US$1 billion of its Class A and Class B shares. The buy-backs will occur from time to time in the open market or through other methods, subject to market conditions, share price levels and other factors.

data.title: Jiangxi Copper Posts Audited 2025 Results and Proposes RMB0.60 Final Dividend
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Jiangxi Copper Company ( (HK:0358) ).

Jiangxi Copper Company Limited, a leading Chinese copper producer active in mining, smelting and processing, reports its results under both PRC GAAP and IFRS, audited with standard unqualified opinions by domestic and overseas units of Ernst & Young. All directors attended the board meeting approving the 2025 annual results, and senior management has formally guaranteed the truthfulness, accuracy and completeness of the disclosed financial information.

The board has proposed a final dividend of RMB0.60 per share for 2025, while deciding against converting capital reserves to share capital or issuing bonus shares, signalling a measured capital return policy. The company also stated there was no misappropriation of funds by controlling shareholders, no guarantees granted outside required procedures, and that industry risks and future development plans have been disclosed, providing additional assurance and risk transparency to investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0358) stock is a Hold with a HK$47.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jiangxi Copper Company stock, see the HK:0358 Stock Forecast page.

More about Jiangxi Copper Company

Jiangxi Copper Company Limited is a major Chinese metals producer focused on the copper industry, operating across mining, smelting and processing of copper and related non-ferrous metals. The group serves both domestic and international markets and prepares its consolidated financial statements under PRC GAAP and International Financial Reporting Standards, reflecting its dual onshore and offshore capital markets presence.

An update from Balaxi Pharmaceuticals Limited ( (IN:BALAXI) ) is now available.

Balaxi Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026, in line with SEBI’s Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations and its internal code of conduct. The restriction will remain in force until 48 hours after the company announces its audited financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended March 31, 2026, with the board meeting date for approving these results to be communicated later, signaling the upcoming earnings disclosure cycle to investors and other stakeholders.

data.title: Retired Fonterra director boosts shareholding via Pencarrow Farm
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Fonterra Co-operative Group Limited ( (NZ:FCG) ) has issued an update.

Former Fonterra director Andrew Webster Macfarlane has disclosed a series of on-market purchases of Fonterra Co-operative Group shares made through Pencarrow Farm Limited, where he is a director and shareholder. The transactions, conducted between 19 and 26 March 2026 at prices just above NZD6.22 per share, increased Pencarrow Farm’s holding from 362,000 to 380,000 Fonterra shares.

The filing also outlines Macfarlane’s substantial remaining interests in Fonterra through Kintore Farm Limited, Deebury Pastoral Partnership and various trusts holding both Fonterra shares and units in the Fonterra Shareholders’ Fund. The disclosure underscores the continued financial alignment of a recently retired director with the co-operative, providing transparency for investors regarding insider holdings and trading activity.

More about Fonterra Co-operative Group Limited

Fonterra Co-operative Group Limited is a New Zealand-based dairy co-operative and one of the world’s largest exporters of dairy products. It is owned by around 9,000 farmer-shareholders and focuses on processing and marketing milk, cheese, butter, powders and other value-added dairy ingredients to global consumer and foodservice markets.

Average Trading Volume: 177,722

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: N$10.22B

data.title: UberDoc Honored for Reverse Merger as Healthcare Marketplace Goes Public on CSE
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from E79 Resources Corp ( (TSE:APPT) ).

UberDoc Health Technologies Corp., a digital healthcare marketplace listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange, links patients directly with board-certified specialists across dozens of U.S. specialties, eliminating traditional insurance referral barriers and emphasizing upfront, transparent pricing. The company, founded by vascular surgeon Dr. Paula Muto and now led by CEO Sean Kearney, operates from Vancouver and Boston, focusing on improving access and economics for both patients and physicians.

UberDoc and CEO Sean Kearney were honored with a 2026 Dealmakers Award at the Boston Smart Business Dealmakers Conference for completing a reverse merger that enabled the company’s recent public listing on the Canadian Securities Exchange. The recognition underscores UberDoc’s evolution from a founder-led startup to a publicly traded healthcare marketplace, positioning it to scale its network and market footprint and reinforcing its visibility among investors, physicians, and patients seeking alternatives to insurance-driven care.

The Dealmakers Conference, a major middle-market M&A event that convenes C-suite leaders and deal professionals across the U.S., highlighted UberDoc’s transaction as an example of conviction and execution in taking a healthcare company public via reverse merger. This milestone is expected to support UberDoc’s growth trajectory as it leverages public markets to expand its marketplace model amid rising demand for faster, more transparent specialist access.

More about E79 Resources Corp

UberDoc Health Technologies Corp. is a digital healthcare marketplace that connects patients directly with more than 5,000 board-certified specialists and clinicians across 55 U.S. specialties, offering transparent, upfront pricing without insurance referrals or hidden costs. Registered in Vancouver with U.S. operations in Boston, the platform aims to give patients faster, more affordable access to care while allowing physicians greater control over their time, revenue, and practice growth.

Average Trading Volume: 49,041

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$2.47M

See more data about APPT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Silex-Backed GLE Wins US$98.9m Incentive Deal for Paducah Enrichment Plant
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Silex Systems Limited ( (AU:SLX) ) is now available.

Global Laser Enrichment, the exclusive licensee of Silex Systems’ laser uranium enrichment technology, has secured preliminary approval for up to US$98.9 million in performance-based tax and economic incentives from the Commonwealth of Kentucky and McCracken County to support its planned Paducah Laser Enrichment Facility. This facility, positioned as the largest capital investment in Western Kentucky’s history, is backed by roughly US$600 million in private investment and is advancing through detailed design, licensing, and technology maturation.

The project is further supported by an award of up to US$28.5 million from the U.S. Department of Energy to advance next-generation laser enrichment for the nuclear fuel cycle, underpinning GLE’s role in rebuilding the U.S. domestic uranium supply chain. By re-enriching the DOE’s depleted uranium tails at Paducah, the plant is expected to aid environmental cleanup, reduce reliance on foreign nuclear fuel, and strengthen U.S. energy security while positioning SILEX technology as a high-efficiency competitor to centrifuge-based enrichment for future nuclear fuel production.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SLX) stock is a Sell with a A$4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Silex Systems Limited stock, see the AU:SLX Stock Forecast page.

More about Silex Systems Limited

Silex Systems Limited is an Australian technology company focused on laser-based uranium enrichment through its proprietary SILEX process, which is licensed exclusively to Global Laser Enrichment. The company targets the nuclear fuel cycle market, aiming to supply enriched uranium products for existing and next-generation nuclear reactors, including advanced and small modular designs.

Average Trading Volume: 1,725,070

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: A$1.54B

data.title: CXApp Raises Private Capital via Unregistered Equity Issuance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

CXApp ( (CXAI) ) just unveiled an update.

CXApp Inc. issued an aggregate 10,028,891 shares of common stock to Avondale Capital, LLC under two pre-paid purchase arrangements linked to a March 26, 2025 securities purchase agreement. The stock was issued in a series of private transactions on February 17, 23, March 2, 13, 19 and 23, 2026 at prices ranging from approximately $0.1568 to $0.1994 per share, relying on an exemption for non‑public offerings under the Securities Act of 1933, which underscores the company’s continued use of private capital-raising structures and has dilutive implications for existing shareholders while strengthening its funding base.

These issuances reflect CXApp’s strategy of securing financing through negotiated pre-paid share purchases with a single institutional investor, rather than conducting a broader public equity raise. The structure may provide funding flexibility and speed for the company, while concentrating ownership exposure for Avondale and signaling to the market that CXApp is willing to accept lower per‑share prices over time in exchange for committed capital.

The most recent analyst rating on (CXAI) stock is a Hold with a $0.26 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CXApp stock, see the CXAI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CXAI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CXAI is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance: sharply declining TTM revenue, very large operating losses, and continued negative operating/free cash flow despite some improvement versus prior periods. Technicals remain unfavorable with the stock below key longer-term moving averages and a negative MACD. The latest earnings call adds a modest offset due to improved margins/expense discipline and positive positioning (Gartner recognition and partnerships), but near-term revenue pressure remains a clear risk. Valuation contributes limited support given negative earnings and no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on CXAI stock, click here.

More about CXApp

CXApp Inc. operates in the technology sector and is publicly traded, issuing common stock as part of its corporate financing activities. The company engages with institutional investors such as Avondale Capital, LLC to raise capital through structured securities purchase agreements rather than solely relying on public offerings.

Average Trading Volume: 9,761,831

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $8.95M

See more data about CXAI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
